auth.signInToContinue: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.inactiveMessage: You were logged out due to inactivity. Please sign in again.
auth.verifyEmailDescription: Enter the verification code sent to your email address.
auth.verifyEmailCardDescription: This step is required before you can sign in.
auth.enterEmailAndCode: Please enter your email and verification code.
auth.emailVerifiedSuccess: Email verified successfully. You can now sign in.
auth.signUpToStart: Sign up to start managing your collections
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.changePasswordDescription: You signed in with a temporary password. Please set a new password to continue.
auth.setPasswordDescription: You were invited to LedgerHive. Enter the code sent to your email and choose a password to sign in.
auth.inviteOtpHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your invite email
auth.invitedByAdmin: Invited by an admin? Set your password
auth.inviteOtpSent: An OTP has been sent to their email. They must set their password using the link below before signing in.
auth.selectModulesDesc: Select the modules you need. You can add or change modules later in Settings.
auth.reviewSignupDesc: Review your details before creating your account.
auth.selectAtLeastOneModule: Please select at least one module.
auth.moduleConnectHint: When both Credit Issuance and Collections are enabled, credit is tracked from application through collection. Overdue obligations automatically appear in Collections.
auth.moduleCollectionsDesc: Track overdue invoices and credit obligations.
auth.moduleIssuanceDesc: Credit applications, accounts, obligations. Connects to Collections when overdue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back! Here's an overview of your collections performance.
dashboard.gettingStartedSubtitle: You're logged in as the tenant administrator. Complete these steps to start seeing data on your dashboard.
dashboard.enableCustomerPortalDescription: Customers below have received their set-password link. Enable portal access so they can sign in.
dashboard.noCustomersPendingPortal: No customers pending. New customers will appear here after they are added.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Track and manage all customer invoices
invoices.searchPlaceholder: Search invoices by ID or customer...
invoices.noInvoicesFound: No invoices found matching your filters
invoices.importExcelHint: Upload an Excel (.xlsx) file with columns: CustomerId, Amount, DueDate (YYYY-MM-DD). First row can be headers.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Manage your customer accounts and credit information
customers.name: Name
customers.importExcelHint: Upload an Excel (.xlsx) file with columns: Name, Email, Phone. First row can be headers.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Manage collection activities and track progress

pwa.installBannerDescription: Add the app to your home screen for quick access and a better experience.

landing.heroTitle: Manage the Entire Credit Lifecycle in One Platform
landing.heroSubtitle: Issue credit, track customer obligations, automate collections, and receive payments — all from a single platform.
landing.problemHeadline: Credit Management Shouldn't Be This Difficult
landing.problemManualDesc: Businesses rely on spreadsheets to track debts.
landing.problemLateDesc: Customers delay payments causing cashflow issues.
landing.problemCollectionsDesc: Following up on customers takes too much time.
landing.problemVisibilityDesc: No clear overview of outstanding obligations.
landing.solutionIssuanceDesc: Issue credit for goods, services, or financial lending.
landing.solutionMonitoringDesc: Track balances, obligations, and payment history.
landing.solutionAutomatedDesc: Send reminders and manage collection workflows.
landing.solutionPaymentsDesc: Allow customers to pay via portal, mobile, or WhatsApp.
landing.modulesHeadline: Powerful Modules for Every Credit Workflow
landing.modulesIssuanceBullets: Customer credit accounts, Credit limits, Obligation tracking
landing.modulesCollectionsBullets: Automated reminders, Collection cases, Payment follow-ups
landing.modulesPaymentsBullets: Payment links, Mobile payments, Payment portal
landing.modulesAIBullets: Credit scoring, Payment prediction, Collection prioritization
landing.paymentExpHeadline: Make It Easy for Customers to Pay
landing.paymentWebDesc: Customers log in and pay their balances.
landing.paymentLinksDesc: Send payment links by email or SMS.
landing.industryHeadline: Built for Businesses That Operate on Credit
landing.industryHealthcareDesc: Manage patient payment plans and medical credit balances.
landing.industryEducationDesc: Handle tuition installment payments and student fee credit.
landing.industryWholesaleDesc: Track retailer credit balances and outstanding invoices.
landing.industryLendingDesc: Manage the full lifecycle of loans from issuance to repayment, including borrower accounts, repayment schedules, and automated collections.
landing.industryAgricultureDesc: Support seasonal farmer credit and input financing.
landing.industryRetailDesc: Manage supplier and distributor credit relationships.
landing.industryLogisticsDesc: Track freight and transport credit balances.
landing.industryConstructionDesc: Manage contractor and supplier credit obligations.
landing.industryProfessionalDesc: Track client payment plans and outstanding invoices.
landing.architectureAPIDesc: Easy integrations with ERP, CRM, and financial systems.
landing.architectureMultiTenantDesc: Secure tenant-isolated infrastructure for multiple organizations.
landing.architectureScalableDesc: Designed to support millions of credit transactions.
landing.architectureSecurityDesc: Data encryption, role-based access, and audit trails.
landing.pricingHeadline: Simple Pricing That Scales With Your Business
landing.testimonialsHeadline: Trusted by Businesses Managing Credit Every Day
landing.testimonial1: LedgerHive helped us recover 40% more overdue payments.
landing.testimonial2: Automating collections saved our team hours every week.
landing.testimonial3: Our lending operations became fully digital with LedgerHive.
landing.finalCtaHeadline: Start Managing Credit the Smart Way
landing.finalCtaSubtext: Join businesses using LedgerHive to manage credit, recover outstanding payments, and automate collections.

creditWorkflow.subtitle: Applications are received by Operation Manager → Collateral Manager (ground check & study form) → back to Ops for credibility → Finance Manager (terms doc, signature) → Manager (sign & release).
creditWorkflow.collateralStudyDescription: Fill this form during or after your visit. Submit to send the study result back to the Operation Manager.

users.onlyAdminAddUsers: Only admins can add users and assign or revoke rights. Admin or Operation Manager can enable portal access.
